currentPhase: macos-redesign-complete-except-capture-matrix; next is PR #18 finalisation then PR #19 / phase-5-backend-reconciliation
currentTask: The Code developer surfaces are redesigned in d19e924, which closes the 'STILL NOT REDESIGNED' list below except for the capture matrix. JunoCodeTheme is now an alias layer over JunoDesignSystem instead of a second design system; new JunoStatus.swift holds the shared status/diff/monospace tokens; every non-message transcript event is one ActivityRow; assistant turns render through JunoMarkdownText; checkpointed edits show they can be reverted; ApprovalBanner became a risk-tinted ApprovalCard; permission mode is a labelled menu in the composer; the inspector tab strip is labelled above a 330pt threshold with an overflow menu and per-tab VoiceOver purposes. Fixed a real preview-isolation defect: JunoMacApp.init() built the live configuration unconditionally, so DEBUG preview launches opened the live account store and built the live auth runtime against chat.liams.dev; preview launches now resolve .inert. NOT DONE, DO NOT READ AS DONE: the 900x650 / 1440x900 / fullscreen / inspector-open capture matrix (window creation for newly launched apps broke after the harness ran killall cfprefsd — never do that), and a confirmed pre-existing SidebarView defect where the Code session list collapses to the bottom edge. Both are recorded in MACOS_DESIGN_REVIEW.md section 8. PRIOR ENTRY: Owner rejected the shipped Chat/Code visuals; design system rebuilt and both shells redesigned in b3f069a. JunoSurfaces.swift adds semantic surfaces, JunoSpace/JunoRadius scales and a type scale, shared with JunoCodeUI. Root cause found for two rejected defects at once: Label(_:systemImage:) in a .sidebar List inherits AppKit's implicit accent tint, which made every nav icon coral in light and made them invisible in dark; icons now state their colour via JunoMacNavigationRow. Sidebar gained a real header region (no painted background, so the system sidebar material shows), tighter rows, redesigned footer. Canvas anchors short threads to the top; user turn narrower and outlined. Composer opens one line tall with a focus ring. Code: inspector starts closed (was eating a third of the window while empty), New Session is a compact row not a giant coral capsule, empty canvas is a suggestions card. STILL NOT REDESIGNED: Code transcript/terminal/diff/tests/Git/approvals, Code composer, inspector tab labels, 900x650 + 1440x900 + fullscreen captures, extended preview scenarios. See docs/native/MACOS_DESIGN_REVIEW.md.
completed: Juno Code developer surfaces redesigned onto the shared design system in d19e924: JunoCodeTheme reduced to an alias layer, new shared JunoStatus.swift tokens, one ActivityRow shape for every transcript event, Markdown assistant turns, visible checkpoints, risk-tinted ApprovalCard, permission-mode menu in the composer, labelled inspector tab strip with overflow and VoiceOver purposes; also fixed JunoMacApp building the live configuration for DEBUG preview launches

Screenshot capture of newly launched apps, in any login session where killall cfprefsd has been run: the preferences daemon takes the window server's app registration with it and newly launched apps never get a main window. Never run it. Recover by logging out and back in.
